transcript: Speaker A: For anyone who doesn't speak another language, you've gotta try Duolingo. Did you know more than half the world's population speaks more than one language? Duolingo has cracked the code, making it easier than ever to learn another language. Duolingo uses research-backed teaching methods to create fun lessons for over 40 different languages! Plus, you can learn for free! What are you waiting for? Download Duolingo today and start your journey to learn another language.

summary: The ad targets monolingual speakers, highlighting that over half the world is bilingual. It promotes Duolingo's free, research-backed lessons for over 40 languages. The CTA invites viewers to download the app and start learning.
